mapper.select: SELECT id, name, created_at, updated_at FROM rls ORDER BY id
SELECT id, name, created_at, updated_at FROM rls WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rls (name, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rls SET name = #{name}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
